analysis:
**Market Assessment:**
IVP environment is terrible - everything at 0-4%, making premium selling unfavorable across the board.

**Best Opportunities:**

**1. Best CSP:** 
SKIP ALL - Both NVDA $165 strike 2026-04-24 (24.1% annualized) and TSLA $350 strike 2026-04-24 (30.0% annualized) fail IVP requirements at 0%. Don't sell premium in this environment.

**2. Best CC:**
NVDA $185 strike 2026-05-01, 38 DTE, $4.65/$4.75 bid/ask, 0.32 delta, 25.6% annualized - only viable option despite 0% IVP due to strong timing score.

**3. Best LEAPS:**
🔥 NVO $25 strike 2028-01-21, 668 DTE, $14.75/$15.20 bid/ask, 0.89 delta, 19.2% extrinsic - exceptional opportunity at 52-week low with 0% IVP making it very cheap.

**4. Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available.

**5. Peter Lynch Discovery:**
None.

**6. Position Income CCs (Existing Holdings):**
Best is AAPL $265 strike 2026-05-15, 52 DTE, $5.40/$5.50, 0.33 delta, 15.2% annualized on profitable overweight position.

**Hard Pass:** All CSPs due to 0% IVP environment. Wait for volatility expansion before selling premium.
